{"society_power": 8.0, "state_power": 8.0, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": 1.0, "key_event": "Fifth Republic consolidation; May 1968 mass mobilization", "reasoning": "The Fifth Republic's centralized executive, end of the Algerian crisis, and dirigiste technocracy substantially strengthened the state, while prosperity, demographic change, electoral contestation, and the massive May 1968 general strike revealed and enhanced latent societal capacity\u2014though the regime ultimately reasserted control."}
